===''Pokémon Horizons: The Series''===
{{main|Nemona (anime)}}
Nemona is a supporting character in {{aniseries|HZ}}. Introduced as a Champion of the Paldea region, Nemona quickly befriended [[Liko]], [[Roy]], and [[Dot]] despite her competitive nature.

Throughout the series, she often helped mentor Roy and served as a friendly rival to him.
